message:
🌱 Add spin: I’d really like to opt-in to Wasm features mission (#842)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

Community-requested feature.", + "type": "feature", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current spin setup", + "description": "Verify your spin version and configuration:\n```bash\nspin version\n```\nThis feature requires a working spin installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review spin configuration", + "description": "Review the relevant spin configuration:\nWith a significant amount of effort I was able to write \u2018hello world\u2018 in Kotlin and run it on Spin! Hooray!\n\n\n\nOne" + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for I\u2019d really like to opt-in to Wasm features", + "description": "How about this:\n\n- Add a new flag `spin up --enable-unstable-feature `\n- When this flag is present, print a loud warning along the lines of \"You have enabled unstable features which might go away at any time, bring a plague of locusts to your land, etc.\"\n- Let's start conservatively and just add the 4 features needs. I think its fine for this to be very verbose, e.g.:\n ```\n $ spin up --enable-unstable-feature wasm_gc \\\n --enable-unstable-feature wasm_reference_types \\" + }, + { + "title": "Verify the feature works", + "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"I\u2019d really like to opt-in to Wasm features\" is functioning correctly." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "How about this:\n\n- Add a new flag `spin up --enable-unstable-feature `\n- When this flag is present, print a loud warning along the lines of \"You have enabled unstable features which might go away at any time, bring a plague of locusts to your land, etc.\"\n- Let's start conservatively and just add the 4 features needs.", + "codeSnippets": [] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "spin", + "sandbox", + "runtime", + "feature" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "spin" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [], + "difficulty": "intermediate", + "issueTypes": [ + "feature" + ], + "maturity": "sandbox", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/spinframework/spin/issues/3364", + "repo": "https://github.com/spinframework/spin" + }, + "reactions": 4, + "comments": 26, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "tools": [ + "spin" + ], + "description": "A working spin installation or development environment." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:44:47.331Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
